programme.title: El wifi
programme.desc: Silvia instala internet de alta velocidad en su departamento, sin embargo su conexión es muy lenta; lo que no sabe es que sus vecinos saben la contraseña y todos se conectan a su red.

programme.title: El método
programme.desc: Lorena está cansada de que Frankie no consiga trabajo y a éste se le ocurre una gran idea: poner una academia de actuación basada en el Método Rivers.

programme.title: El click
programme.desc: Arturo llora porque su familia es pobre y Lorena lo consuela, Germán y Pedro creen que son amantes. Magda encuentra una nota de amor y las cosas se enredan más de la cuenta.

programme.title: La separación
programme.desc: Lorena trata de seducir a Frankie, pero él la rechaza porque está escribiendo un guión, ella lo insulta y él decide irse de su casa. Finalmente Benito regresa a casa después de 10 años.

programme.title: Benito regresa
programme.desc: Benito está de regreso después de mucho tiempo. Lalo invita a salir a Silvita y comienza a planear su futuro. A los López Pérez les cortan los servicios y dejan sin luz a media colonia.

programme.title: Los candidatos
programme.desc: Silvia y Arturo compiten para ser el presidente del vecindario. Alejandra y Rocko se preocupan porque creen que han perdido su juventud y personalidad.

programme.title: Hoy juega México
programme.desc: La tía Oli visita a su sobrina Silvita y no se irá hasta conseguirle pareja. Germán organiza una reunión para ver fútbol, pero todos escapan cuando les pide cooperación. Silvita intenta imitar a su tía, mientras en su casa se arma un caos.

programme.title: Reunión de ex alumnos
programme.desc: Silvia organiza una reunión en su departamento para sus excompañeros, por lo que le pide a Pedro que se haga pasar por su novio para que no piensen que sigue soltera.

programme.title: Jorjáis roomie
programme.desc: Magdalena sospecha de que Lorena tiene un amante y convence a Silvia de seguirla para descubrir la verdad. Pedro le renta a Jorjáis la habitación de Luis para que tenga donde dormir, sin imaginar las consecuencias.

programme.title: La telenovela
programme.desc: Los vecinos rentan el edificio para la grabación de una telenovela y por accidente, Jorjáis resulta ser un gran actor compartiendo escenas con Renata Notni.

programme.title: Mi vieja
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Pedro que lo releve con un asunto. Pedro se confunde y actúa de manera exagerada. Germán evitará que dejen basura afuera del edificio.

programme.title: Nuevo inquilino
programme.desc: Un nuevo vecino llega al edificio para rentar uno de los departamentos y Silvia se enamora de él. Germán quiere tatuarse y pide recomendaciones.

programme.title: La venganza de la maestra
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que la maestra de Morris es Belén, la misma maestra que ella molestaba. Chelo, la empleada doméstica de Silvia, tiene más suerte en el amor que ella.

programme.title: Arturo amuleto
programme.desc: Jorjáis cree que Arturo le trae buena suerte a su equipo de fútbol cuando va a los partidos, por lo que buscará la manera para que él esté presente en la final del torneo y así poder ganar.

programme.title: La bomba de agua
programme.desc: Los vecinos le piden a Germán que repare la bomba de agua del edificio para evitar pagarle a un plomero profesional. Jovita intenta que Pedro cambie sus hábitos alimenticios, pero él se rehúsa y hace una huelga de hambre.

programme.title: Echando cohetes
programme.desc: Los vecinos se molestan por el ruido que provocan los cohetes de una fiesta. Rocko se queja de que Alejandra no es cariñosa con él.

programme.title: El desalojo
programme.desc: Frankie se entera de que un famoso director está interesado en uno de sus guiones. Los López Pérez reciben una orden de desalojo. Germán decide irse a Estados Unidos tras una decepción amorosa.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - Louisiana Ducks
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins Jean-Paul Bourgeois and Ronnie Collins in Louisiana‚ Mississippi Delta for a duck hunt. Surrounded by the unique landscape of the Delta, they target multiple duck species. After a successful hunt, the team returns to camp, where Jean-Paul prepares a traditional Cajun meal featuring the day‚ catch. Experience the cultural tradition of turning fresh game into flavorful, local dishes like duck gumbo and crawfish boil.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Hogs and Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella, Ryan Callahan, and Danny Bolton travel to Hawaii's Big Island for a unique hunt. They stalk feral sheep in the lush mountainsides and target wild hogs on a coffee plantation, using the animals' movements through macadamia groves to their advantage. The episode highlights Hawaii's blend of hunting and conservation, ending with a Hawaiian-style feast featuring the fresh game they harvested.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Spearfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with spearfishing champions Danny Bolton and Kimi Werner.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose
programme.desc: In this episode of MeatEater, Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head into Alaska's remote interior.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Black Bear
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve introduces Randall Williams and Clay Newcomb to his fish shack in Prince of Wales, Alaska where they fish for cod, set shrimp pots and hunt for black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Michigan Squirrels and Rabbits
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve jets off to his home state of Michigan to hunt for small game with friends Guy Zuck and Kevin Murphy.

programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mule Deer
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful.

programme.title: MeatEater - Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve and Janis Putelis are in Florida with local, Richard Martinez, in search for the illusive Osceola Turkey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater - Texas Turkey with Luke Combs
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the Yturria Ranch in south Texas, this time, to hunt turkeys and pigs with country musician Luke Combs. Their plans to chase the spring thunder shifts as the weather has a different idea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to Tanzania
programme.desc: Steven Rinella travels to Tanzania for his first African safari with professional hunter, Morgan Potter. In this episode, Morgan and his team show Steve the ropes of hunting in this foreign terrain for otherworldly big game species. Steve's quest for a cape buffalo moves to the side burner when the team discovers an impressive roan antelope.

programme.title: Inauguration
programme.desc: A morning more hectic than most for Capt. Barney Miller and the detectives of the 12th Precinct marks the inauguration of New York City's new mayor, Ed Koch. The entire police force is mobilized to protect the mayor-elect during the public ceremony, to investigate the residents of the mayor's apartment building, and examine threatening mail. Det. Harris is away from the squad room, temporarily assigned to the mayor's security detail. Officer Levitt, temporarily a plainclothesman, is helping Dietrich investigate a series of anonymous, threatening letters to Koch. Wojo returns from the mayor's building with prisoner Allen Korble, whom Wojo has discovered smoking marijuana. According to Korble, the marijuana is for medicinal purposes to prevent blindness due to glaucoma. Harris returns and announces to everyone's shock that, since he and "Ed" have been getting along so yell, Harris has been asked to join the mayor's permanent staff. The other officers are stunned and hurt that Harris has decided to leave without conferring with them beforehand. Harris returns to his mayor-protecting duties as Dietrich and Levitt bring in the perpetrator of the threatening letters, a pleasant lady in her sixties named Evelyn Hawley. She proves to be disgruntled but distracted, a basically harmless old widow. Wojo and Levitt, sent to rescue a man threatening to jump out of a building onto the inauguration crowd, return with one Noel Cady, self-styled "mayor of the hearts of the people," a political fanatic. While Cady harangues all who will listen, Barney frees Mrs. Hawley, and Korble, who upon investigation is discovered to have a genuine optometrist's prescription for his marijuana. Harris angrily returns, having turned down the job with the mayor when he was informed of the menial duties he would be performing. As the new mayor's speech is heard on the radio, the officers of the 12th Precinct shake hands and wish each other a happier New Year.

programme.desc: When Fire Chief Joe Carson is looking for a way to go to Miami, he hires Oliver as his assistant, hoping Oliver will pay for the trip. The plan backfires, no pun intended, when Oliver starts pointing out what a poor job the chief has been doing.

programme.title: The Candidate
programme.desc: The highways in Hooterville are in dire need of repair. Oliver is fed up and believes he can make a difference by complaining to his state representative, Ben Hanks. But Hanks' popularity proves greater than his sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Handy Lessons
programme.desc: Lisa feels like she should be contributing more and wants to start working in Oliver's construction business. Lisa is like a fish out of water as she arrives to the Monroes' workshop in overalls and causes one problem after another.

programme.title: A Husband For Eleanor
programme.desc: Lisa plays bovine matchmaker when Oliver and Lisa decide it is time for their female cow, Eleanor, to start providing milk for the farm. Oliver makes arrangements for Eleanor to mooooove in with the neighbor's bull, but Lisa has other ideas.

programme.title: Old Mail Day
programme.desc: The townsfolk look forward to "Old Mail Day", when once a year undelivered mail is handed out. The delayed mail includes a letter all the way from 1917! Oliver is upset by the poor service, but his complaints land with more impact than he intended.

programme.title: The Agricultural Student
programme.desc: When word spreads that an agricultural student is coming to Hooterville to study with county agent Hank Kimball, no one seems to be interested. However, things change when the folks discover that the student is an attractive blonde.

programme.title: How Hooterville Was Floundered
programme.desc: This episode tells the unusual tale of Hooterville's founding. As the town prepares for its centennial, Oliver announces a reenactment of the town's origins and casts himself and Lisa in the roles of Horace and Doris Hooter.

programme.title: The Blue Feather
programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.title: Everywhere A Chick Chick
programme.desc: Don't count chickens before they hatch! Oliver thinks he's laid a gold egg of an idea when he decides to dive beak first into the business of raising chickens. Lisa, on the other hand, sees little difference between raising chickens and children.

programme.title: A Prize In Each And Every Package
programme.desc: All that glitters is not frosted cereal. After a jewelry heist in Chicago, the robbers foolishly stash their booty in the grain bin of a cereal manufacturer. Oliver and Lisa discover the jewels in their bowl of Crickly Wickly!

programme.title: Law Partners
programme.desc: Oliver Wendell Douglas returns from farm to firm... law firm, that is. When a young and ambitious local graduates from law school, he looks for a potential partner in Hooterville. Oliver is the logical choice. Lisa and Eb help the new venture.

programme.title: A Day In The Life Of Oliver Wendell Holmes
programme.desc: After partnering with a young, local lawyer, Oliver has opened a new law office in Hooterville. However, their secretary, Lisa, shows a lack of necessary skills. Soon, Lisa's job is on the line, even if she is married to one of the partners.

programme.title: Economy Flight To Washington
programme.desc: When the Young Peoples Agricultural Society holds their annual convention in Washington, D.C., local members Eb, Mr. Kimball, and Arnold the pig get ready to make the big trip. Oliver and Lisa serve as unintended chaperones.

programme.title: Retreat From Washington
programme.desc: While Lisa and Oliver consider what to do on their unplanned trip to Washington D.C., Mr. Haney rents their house to a family of eight. Meanwhile in the nation's capital, Lisa and Eb tour the White House, and Mr. Kimball makes official trouble.

programme.title: A Hunting We Won't Go
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.title: Eb Uses His Ingenuity
programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: The Old Trunk
programme.desc: Lisa becomes enchanted with the diary of a Lydia Plunkett. Found in an old trunk in the barn, the diary from 1898 tells Lydia's life story as a successful businesswoman. Eb and Lisa are glued to every page of the story, but Oliver isn't impressed.

programme.desc: A Ranger uses his instincts and experience to solve crimes.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Lurch, The Teenage Idol
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Winning Of Morticia Addams
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: My Fair Cousin Itt
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 2)
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: Morticia Meets Royalty
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: Gomez, The People's Choice
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: Cousin Itt's Problem
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: Halloween, Addams Style
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: Morticia, The Writer
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it, he will lose her.

programme.title: Morticia, The Sculptress
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets, a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: Gomez, The Reluctant Lover
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: Frayed
programme.desc: During a bus ride to a cross country meet, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends flash back to the events of a preemptive strike against the Alphas that has left several injured and possibly one or more dead.

programme.title: Motel California
programme.desc: Stranded at a motel in Fairvale, California for the night because of a postponed meet, Scott (Tyler Posey) and the others suffer strange experiences that cause them to believe members of their own group may the mysterious killer's newest targets.

programme.title: Currents
programme.desc: As the danger begins to move closer to Scott (Tyler Posey) his trusted mentor and boss, Deaton (Seth Gilliam), is threatened. Meanwhile, Kali (Felisha Terrell) and the twins (Charlie Carver and Max Carver) go after Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Visionary
programme.desc: Seeking answers, Scott (Tyler Posey). Allison (Crystal Reed) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hear stories told by two unlikely narrators -- Peter (Ian Bohen) and Gerard (Michael Hogan) -- and discover a secret about the color of a werewolf's eyes.

programme.title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: As Allison (Crystal Reed) begins to suspect someone close to her may be involved in the murders, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) conclude that Lydia's (Holland Roden) rising talents may be their best bet to solving the murders.

programme.title: The Overlooked
programme.desc: Trapped inside an evacuated Beacon Hills hospital during a powerful storm, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) must defend themselves against the Alphas while trying to figure out how to save Cora's (Adelaide Kane) life.

programme.title: Alpha Pact
programme.desc: With the threat growing more personal and time running out, Scott (Tyler Posey) is forced to make a difficult choice to save family and friends while, at the same time, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) try to figure out how to save Cora.

programme.title: Lunar Ellipse
programme.desc: In the mid-season finale, under Deaton's advice, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends use an ancient but dangerous ritual to help them both save the lives of the people they love and stop Deucalion (Gideon Emery) from achieving his sinister goal.

programme.title: Anchors
programme.desc: Weeks after saving the lives of their parents, Scott, Stiles and Allison suffer strange side effects from their ritual sacrifice. At the same time, the newly enlightened Sheriff Stilinski scours through old cases, looking for supernatural causes.

programme.title: More Bad Than Good
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends race to figure out how to catch the Werecoyote Malia before it's hunted down and killed by her father. Meanwhile, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) are broken out of captivity by an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Abaddon
programme.desc: The crew of a space salvage ship is awakened from hyper-sleep when they come across a mysterious object floating through space. They soon discover the pod contains a tyrant, in stasis, who was banished from Earth for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: The Grid
programme.desc: A man travels back to his home town in order to investigate his brother's murder, allegedly at the hands of his brother's wife. He quickly discovers his hometown has drastically changed...and the residents seem to be under some form of mind control.

programme.title: Revival
programme.desc: A preacher (Gary Busey), who lost his faith when his wife died, performs staged healing miracles at tent revivals until he finds his faith -- and livelihood -- being tested as never before by the appearance of a mysterious wheelchair-bound man.

programme.title: Gettysburg
programme.desc: Two friends re-enacting the Battle of Gettysburg unwittingly find themselves transported back in time and taken prisoner by a deranged Confederate colonel (Meatloaf) who might not only endanger their future…but the future of the country as well.

programme.title: Something About Harry

programme.title: How To Overcome The Worst Pain Of Your Life
programme.desc: From Hollywood’s biggest star to a near-tragic ending, Jeremy Renner’s comeback is a story of pain, recovery, and incredible resilience. How did the Oscar nominee fight to bounce back, and what’s next now that he’s fully recovered? Expect to learn the real story of what happened to Jeremy during the snowplow accident, what it feels like to get run over and see your eyeball fall out of it’s socket, how Jeremy was able to recover so well and look as just as he did before the accident, how to deal with excruciating amount of pain, how Jeremy’s meditation practices came in handy during his darkest hours, what it was like being a part of The Avengers & the craziness of being one of the biggest stars in the world, and much more…

programme.title: 41 Harsh Truths Nobody Wants To Admit
programme.desc: Alex’s Twitter has been one of my favourite sources of insights over the last few years. Today we get to go through some of his best lessons about life, human behaviour, psychology, business and resilience again. And as always this is so, so good. Expect to learn the skills needed to thrive in todays every changing world, why a few bad days shouldn’t ruin the rest of your year, how Alex’s mind has changed about work and happiness in the past year, how to figure out what you want in life, the rare dynamic between Alex and his wife Leila, why having a work life balance isn’t all it’s cracked up to be, why more money won’t buy you more happiness, how to get a top tier girls and much more…

programme.title: Sharp Truths From A British Comedian
programme.desc: Having made his career out of cutting jokes and brutal roasts, today Jimmy Carr reveals a more introspective side. Jimmy opens up about his favorite parts of life, the best bits of his show, and the wisdom he's picked up along the way. Expect to learn why Jimmy is such a fan of the show, and how his thinking has been influenced but the MW podcast ecosystem, how to know what you should be doing with your life, ways to overcome anxiety and dealing with the balance of meaning and pleasure, what life is like on the road for Jimmy, how Jimmy has learned to enjoy his time better, and where he finds gratitude, how fatherhood changed Jimmy for the better, how to become someone worth becoming, and much more…
